title: dolichandrone heterophylla
intro: Dolichandrone heterophylla, also known as the Horse Field or Horse Saddle Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dolichandrone heterophylla include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
